# Asyar Built-in Icons

Reference for all built-in icons available in the Asyar SDK.

## Usage

**In manifests, commands, search results, and actions** — use the `icon:name` prefix:

```json
{ "icon": "icon:calculator" }
```

**Inside your extension view** — use the SDK utilities:

```typescript
// Register once in main.ts
import { registerIconElement } from 'asyar-sdk';
registerIconElement();
```

```html
<asyar-icon name="calculator" size="20"></asyar-icon>
```

**Or programmatically:**

```typescript
import { renderIcon } from 'asyar-sdk';
element.innerHTML = renderIcon('calculator', { size: 20 });
```

## Icon Reference

Icons are grouped by purpose to help you pick the right one quickly.

### Features & Navigation

| Preview | Name | Usage |
|---------|------|-------|
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="calculator"> | calculator | `icon:calculator` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="ai-chat"> | ai-chat | `icon:ai-chat` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="settings"> | settings | `icon:settings` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="keyboard"> | keyboard | `icon:keyboard` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="dev-tools"> | dev-tools | `icon:dev-tools` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="store"> | store | `icon:store` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="globe"> | globe | `icon:globe` |

### Content & Files

| Preview | Name | Usage |
|---------|------|-------|
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="clipboard"> | clipboard | `icon:clipboard` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="snippets"> | snippets | `icon:snippets` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="file-text"> | file-text | `icon:file-text` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="image"> | image | `icon:image` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="type"> | type | `icon:type` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="layers"> | layers | `icon:layers` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="link"> | link | `icon:link` |

### Actions & Operations

| Preview | Name | Usage |
|---------|------|-------|
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="plus"> | plus | `icon:plus` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="trash"> | trash | `icon:trash` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="refresh"> | refresh | `icon:refresh` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="pencil"> | pencil | `icon:pencil` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="copy"> | copy | `icon:copy` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="scissors"> | scissors | `icon:scissors` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="filter"> | filter | `icon:filter` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="eye"> | eye | `icon:eye` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="star"> | star | `icon:star` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="pin"> | pin | `icon:pin` |

### Calculator Variants

| Preview | Name | Usage | Represents |
|---------|------|-------|------------|
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="calc-currency"> | calc-currency | `icon:calc-currency` | Currency / exchange |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="calc-units"> | calc-units | `icon:calc-units` | Unit conversion |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="calc-date"> | calc-date | `icon:calc-date` | Date / calendar |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="24" height="24" alt="calc-base"> | calc-base | `icon:calc-base` | Base conversion (hex, binary) |

## Programmatic Access

```typescript
import { listIcons, hasIcon, getIconData, renderIcon } from 'asyar-sdk';

listIcons();              // string[] — all available names
hasIcon('calculator');    // true
getIconData('calculator'); // raw SVG inner content (no <svg> wrapper)
renderIcon('calculator', { size: 20, strokeWidth: 1.5 }); // complete <svg> string
```
